title: helichrysum bellidiastrum
intro: Helichrysum bellidiastrum, also known as the false everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its small yellow flowers and silvery-gray foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum bellidiastrum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine.
